name: cep_exists_flush_first_defer
drl: rule R when exists E1() P() then end
_finding: D-152 (mechanical ExShadow): the IF left is itself STAGED at the exists until the first FIRE-LOOP eval, so a FIRST satisfaction emits reverse(rtm) at the fire loop — swallowing P's drained AFTER the witness in the same window. P1 staged since cycle 0 (one-sided window: never linked), [P2,E1,P3] in ep1: E1's force-flush drains [P1,P2] (staged-LIFO -> rtm=[P2,P1]) but the staged IF waits; the fire-loop drains [P3] then the IF goes through: reverse([P2,P1,P3]) = [3,1,2]. The retired D-144 key predicted FIFO [1,2,3] (graft: BfDump ex990x20).
